name: sbom emits a valid JSON sidecar carrying the bill of materials and its digest
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . --json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.sbom&&j.digest&&(j.sbom.components||j.sbom.packages).length===2?0:1)' && echo h15-json-sidecar 1>&2
